visa_types.name: Employment Visa
visa_types.visa_fees:
[tur > phl > en > Table:Employment> Visa Fees 1]
Note: 
- All fees are non-refundable under all circumstances
- Exact amount of Visa fees must be paid in USD in cash 
- Service and Value Added Service fee can be paid in Philippines Peso
visa_types.processing_time:
The time required for the visa application process until issuance, assuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of 15 calendar days from the day the application is received.
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Embassy of Türkiye or VFS Global Türkiye Visa Application Center.
Early application 
The earliest you can apply is 90 days before your travel date. Please verify your travel date before booking your appointment.
Rescheduling Due to Travel Dates 
If you realize on the day of your appointment that your travel date falls outside the 90-day policy, you need to book a new appointment with a new fee.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Employment Visa (Work Visa) is authorization for a foreigner to legally work in Turkey for a specific employer, requiring both an approved work permit from the Ministry of Labor and a special visa sticker in your passport for entry, usually processed by the employer. It's tied to a job offer, and the Turkish company sponsors the work permit application on your behalf after you get the job, making the permit serve as your residence permit once approved and you've entered Turkey. 
Categories
a) Employment Purpose/Special Employment Purpose 
b) Assigned Lecturers/Academics 
c) Assigned Sportsperson 
d) Assigned Artists 
e) Assigned Free Zone Workers 
f) Assigned Journalists 
g) Montage and Repairman Purposes
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Employment Visa (Work Visa) is authorization for a foreigner to legally work in Turkey for a specific employer, requiring both an approved work permit from the Ministry of Labor and a special visa sticker in your passport for entry, usually processed by the employer. It's tied to a job offer, and the Turkish company sponsors the work permit application on your behalf after you get the job, making the permit serve as your residence permit once approved and you've entered Turkey. 
Categories
a) Employment Purpose/Special Employment Purpose 
b) Assigned Lecturers/Academics 
c) Assigned Sportsperson 
d) Assigned Artists 
e) Assigned Free Zone Workers 
f) Assigned Journalists 
g) Montage and Repairman Purposes

## Visa Fees

[tur > phl > en > Table:Employment> Visa Fees 1]
Note: 
- All fees are non-refundable under all circumstances
- Exact amount of Visa fees must be paid in USD in cash 
- Service and Value Added Service fee can be paid in Philippines Peso

## Documents Required
Employment Visa

## Processing Time
The time required for the visa application process until issuance, assuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of 15 calendar days from the day the application is received.
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Embassy of Türkiye or VFS Global Türkiye Visa Application Center.
Early application 
The earliest you can apply is 90 days before your travel date. Please verify your travel date before booking your appointment.
Rescheduling Due to Travel Dates 
If you realize on the day of your appointment that your travel date falls outside the 90-day policy, you need to book a new appointment with a new fee.

Visa Application Form

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Montage Visa (or Assembly/Maintenance Visa) is a specific, short-term work visa for foreign professionals (like engineers, technicians) coming to Turkey for up to 90 days within a year for project-based assembly, installation, repair, or maintenance work, allowing multiple entries but requiring applications at Turkish consulates abroad with meticulous documentation. It's distinct from standard work permits, often used for short, specialized tasks where the main salary and social security are handled from abroad, and it's project-specific, meaning work beyond the approved scope is illegal.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Montage Visa (or Assembly/Maintenance Visa) is a specific, short-term work visa for foreign professionals (like engineers, technicians) coming to Turkey for up to 90 days within a year for project-based assembly, installation, repair, or maintenance work, allowing multiple entries but requiring applications at Turkish consulates abroad with meticulous documentation. It's distinct from standard work permits, often used for short, specialized tasks where the main salary and social security are handled from abroad, and it's project-specific, meaning work beyond the approved scope is illegal. 

## Visa Fees

[tur > phl > en > Table:Machine Assembly, Repair & Maintenance> Visa Fees 1]
Note: 
- All fees are non-refundable under all circumstances

- Service and Value Added Service fee can be paid in Philippines Peso

Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Embassy of Türkiye or VFS Global Türkiye Visa Application Center.
Early application 
The earliest you can apply is 90 days before your travel date. Please verify your travel date before booking your appointment.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Family Unification Visa allows close relatives (spouses, minor children, sometimes parents) of a Turkish citizen or a foreigner with a valid Turkish residence permit to join them in Turkey for the purpose of living together, granting a temporary residence permit that aligns with the sponsor's permit duration, requiring proof of kinship and financial stability, and ensuring the family unit stays together. It's designed for family unity, not other activities like work or tourism. 
Who can apply?
- Spouses: To live with their partner in Turkey.
- Minor Children (under 18): To join their parent(s) residing in Turkey.
- Parents: In specific cases, often dependent on the sponsor's status and the child's age/dependency.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Family Unification Visa allows close relatives (spouses, minor children, sometimes parents) of a Turkish citizen or a foreigner with a valid Turkish residence permit to join them in Turkey for the purpose of living together, granting a temporary residence permit that aligns with the sponsor's permit duration, requiring proof of kinship and financial stability, and ensuring the family unit stays together. It's designed for family unity, not other activities like work or tourism. 
Who can apply?
- Spouses: To live with their partner in Turkey.
- Minor Children (under 18): To join their parent(s) residing in Turkey.
- Parents: In specific cases, often dependent on the sponsor's status and the child's age/dependency. 

## Visa Fees

Note: 
- All fees are non-refundable under all circumstances

Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Tour Operator Visa is a specific visa category for foreign professionals organizing or guiding tourist groups in Turkey, allowing them to manage tourism activities for up to eight months without needing a full work permit, facilitating group tours rather than individual travel for leisure. It's for those who work in tourism (operators, guides) and requires documentation proving their role in organizing trips, distinct from regular tourist visas for holidays.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Tour Operator Visa is a specific visa category for foreign professionals organizing or guiding tourist groups in Turkey, allowing them to manage tourism activities for up to eight months without needing a full work permit, facilitating group tours rather than individual travel for leisure. It's for those who work in tourism (operators, guides) and requires documentation proving their role in organizing trips, distinct from regular tourist visas for holidays.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
For planned medical treatment, including surgeries (cosmetic or complex).
A Turkish Health Visa (or Medical Treatment Visa) is a specific entry permit for foreigners traveling to Turkey for medical procedures, hospitalization, and recovery, allowing for longer stays than tourist visas. It's essential for those undergoing complex treatments, cosmetic procedures, or transplants.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
A diplomatic/official visa is a specialized, nonimmigrant travel document issued to foreign government officials, diplomats, or representatives of international organizations traveling to a foreign country solely for official duties on behalf of their national government.
*Working at a foreign embassy or consulate.
*Attending official meetings or conducting government affairs.
*Representing a country at an international organization (e.g., United Nations)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
Tourism refers to travel undertaken for leisure, recreation, and personal enjoyment. The purposes of travel are usually for relaxation, adventure, sightseeing, cultural immersion, recreation, and exploration. 
Family & Friend Visit refers to travel specifically undertaken to visit relatives or close acquaintances. The purposes of travel are reconnecting with loved ones, attending family events, or providing support (e.g., during life events).
visa_types.full_text:

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Transit Visa is a permit for travelers from certain countries who need to leave the airport's international transit area during a layover in Turkey to reach a third destination, allowing them to stay in the city overnight or sightsee before catching their connecting flight distinct from staying within the airport. 
Who Needs It?
- Nationals of Specific Countries:
 Primarily for citizens from countries who don't have visa-free transit rights.
- Leaving the Airport:
 Required if you plan to exit the airport's transit zone, stay in a hotel, or sightsee during your layover.
- Connecting Flights:
 For travelers with a confirmed onward ticket to another country after their layover in Turkey.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Transit Visa is a permit for travelers from certain countries who need to leave the airport's international transit area during a layover in Turkey to reach a third destination, allowing them to stay in the city overnight or sightsee before catching their connecting flight distinct from staying within the airport. 
Who Needs It?
- Nationals of Specific Countries:
 Primarily for citizens from countries who don't have visa-free transit rights.
- Leaving the Airport:
 Required if you plan to exit the airport's transit zone, stay in a hotel, or sightsee during your layover.
- Connecting Flights:
 For travelers with a confirmed onward ticket to another country after their layover in Turkey. 

## Visa Fees

[tur > phl > en > Table:Transit> Visa Fees 1]
Note: 
- All fees are non-refundable under all circumstances
- Exact amount of Visa fees must be paid in USD in cash 
- Service and Value Added Service fee can be paid in Philippines Peso

## Documents Required
Transit Visa

## Processing Time
The time required for the visa application process until issuance, assuming there are no issues with the required documents, visa application, etc., typically takes a minimum of 15 calendar days from the day the application is received.
However, if the number of applications is very high or if further checks are necessary, the process may take longer. Additionally, if there are doubts regarding the visa application, documents, etc., or if a thorough inspection by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs is required, the visa issuance may take more than 1 month.
Therefore, it is advised to submit your application well in advance.
If a ticket expire before the visa is issued, it is not the responsibility of the Embassy of Türkiye or VFS Global Türkiye Visa Application Center.
Early application 
The earliest you can apply is 90 days before your travel date. Please verify your travel date before booking your appointment.
Rescheduling Due to Travel Dates 
If you realize on the day of your appointment that your travel date falls outside the 90-day policy, you need to book a new appointment with a new fee.

## Download Forms

Visa Application Form

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
Commercial visits, meetings, trade shows, business negotiations, establishing a business (not working for an employer).
Important Distinction: Business Visa vs. Work Permit
- A Business Visa is to facilitate business (e.g., meetings, seminars, conferences). 
- A Work Permit (and Work Annotated Visa) is required if you intend to be employed in Turkey, involving a more complex application process with your employer in Turkey
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Purpose:
Commercial visits, meetings, trade shows, business negotiations, establishing a business (not working for an employer).
Important Distinction: Business Visa vs. Work Permit
- A Business Visa is to facilitate business (e.g., meetings, seminars, conferences). 
- A Work Permit (and Work Annotated Visa) is required if you intend to be employed in Turkey, involving a more complex application process with your employer in Turkey

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Student Visa is a mandatory permit for international students to enter and stay in Turkey for educational purposes, allowing enrollment in universities or courses, and it must be obtained from a Turkish consulate before arrival, leading to a residence permit once in Turkey for the full duration of study. 
Key Aspects
Entry and temporary stay for academic programs (bachelor's, master's, PhD, language, vocational) or internships.
Categories
a) Internship Visa 
b) Internship ERASMUS 
c) Internship AISEC 
d) Turkish Language Course Purpose 
e) Course Purpose 
f) Education Purpose
g) Education in Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Purpose:
A Turkish Student Visa is a mandatory permit for international students to enter and stay in Turkey for educational purposes, allowing enrollment in universities or courses, and it must be obtained from a Turkish consulate before arrival, leading to a residence permit once in Turkey for the full duration of study. 
Key Aspects
Entry and temporary stay for academic programs (bachelor's, master's, PhD, language, vocational) or internships.
Categories
a) Internship Visa 
b) Internship ERASMUS 
c) Internship AISEC 
d) Turkish Language Course Purpose 
e) Course Purpose 
f) Education Purpose
g) Education in Turkish Republic of Northern Cyprus
